title: PLAYER-CENTRIC CULTURE
desc: We focus on the player experience. Every mechanic and every pixel must serve one goal: providing pure gaming satisfaction.

title: CREATIVE FREEDOM
desc: No rigid boundaries. We encourage experimentation with gameplay and emerging technologies to drive innovation.

title: FULL OWNERSHIP
desc: You have a voice in level design, balancing, and narrative. Your individual contribution determines the fate of the entire project.
